records.name: Tetso Coders Club
records.description: Student-run club for coding, hackathons, and open-source projects.
records.how_to_join: Sign up at the club fair in August or email the coordinator with your year and interest area.

records.name: Harmony Music Society
records.description: College music society organizing band performances, open mics, and intercollege fests.
records.how_to_join: Audition during the first 2 weeks of the semester. Bring your instrument or a song.

records.name: Tetso Debating & MUN Society
records.description: Weekly debates, parliamentary sessions, and intercollege MUN representation.
records.how_to_join: Attend two trial sessions, then register with the secretary.

records.name: Tetso Sports Association
records.description: Manages all inter-departmental and intercollege sports tournaments.
records.how_to_join: Register at the Physical Education Department; trials are held in the first month.

records.name: NSS Tetso Unit
records.description: National Service Scheme unit running community outreach, blood drives, and awareness camps.
records.how_to_join: Open enrolment in August; 120 service hours required per year.
